exporter.method: SMPL-X LBS from neutral npz using wrist joints 20/21 at -90 degrees around raw SMPL-X X axis; region assignments copied by face index from male regional sidecar.
exporter.name: export_neutral_smplx_regions_without_blender.py

objectCustomProperties.oh_region_source: Transferred by SMPL-X face index from manually corrected master-pose neutral regionalization.

regionEncoding.primary: GLB material names and material slots encode region identity.
regionEncoding.sidecar: faceGlbMaterialIndices, faceBlendMaterialSlotIndices, faceRegionIds, and faceParentRegionIds arrays are stored in this JSON by Blender face index.

topology: SMPL-X 10475 vertices / 20908 triangular faces; face order matches official SMPL-X topology.
